meta.name: Tony Alpha Registry
meta.description: Tony Alpha's first database and single source of truth. Tony Alpha is the command center; it does NOT replace or rebuild the tasks/agents it tracks.
meta.registry_principle: The registry is Tony Alpha's first database. Everything eventually registers itself here — agents, modules, departments, integrations, memory, skills, and workflows — each with a stable ID. The non-agent registries below are scaffolded now and populated in later sprints.
meta.notes: Architecture Review 001 (2026-07-08) added stable_id, owner, priority, dependencies, and health_score. owner/priority/dependencies were assigned by the review and are PROVISIONAL until confirmed by GIOK (see action_items.md). health_score is null and status/last_run stay 'unknown'/null until Tony Alpha can observe real runs. Dependencies are upstream; downstream impact is derived by inverting the dependency graph (see tony_summary.md).

categories.system: Health, security, and meta-oversight of the agent fleet

agents.name: GoHighLevel SMS Reply Monitor
agents.purpose: Watch GoHighLevel for inbound SMS replies so no lead/customer text goes unanswered.
agents.notes: Overlap candidate with GHL Lead Text Batch Reminder — both touch GHL texting. Confirm one monitors inbound, the other prompts outbound.

agents.name: Social Media Scan
agents.purpose: Scan social channels for mentions, engagement, and items needing a response.
agents.notes: Part of the social cluster. Distinct from content creation/planning.

agents.name: Training Scanner
agents.purpose: Scan for new training material / learning opportunities.
agents.notes: Purpose to confirm: training for staff, for the AI agents, or industry training content?

agents.name: Yahoo Reader
agents.purpose: Read the Yahoo inbox and surface items of interest.
agents.notes: One of three email-touching agents. Confirm it feeds the triage digest rather than duplicating it.

agents.name: Email Triage Digest
agents.purpose: Triage inbound email into a digest of what needs attention.
agents.notes: Overlap candidate with Morning Digest — clarify whether the email triage feeds into, or duplicates, the morning digest.

agents.name: Lead Research / Referral Partners
agents.purpose: Research leads and identify/nurture referral partners.
agents.notes: Overlap candidate with Engagement Leads — confirm one is top-of-funnel research and the other is engaging existing leads.

agents.name: Gmail Junk Labeler
agents.purpose: Auto-label junk/low-value email in Gmail to keep the inbox clean.
agents.notes: Third email agent. Complements triage; not expected to overlap.

agents.name: Upwork Message Check
agents.purpose: Check the Upwork inbox for new client/prospect messages.

agents.name: Agent Health Check
agents.purpose: Check that the scheduled agents are running and healthy.
agents.notes: Overlap candidate with Performance Review On Agents. Health check = is it running? Performance review = is it doing good work? Tony Alpha should ingest both rather than compete with them.

agents.name: Engagement Leads
agents.purpose: Engage / follow up with leads to drive responses.
agents.notes: See Lead Research overlap note.

agents.name: Morning Digest
agents.purpose: Produce a morning summary of what happened / what needs attention.
agents.notes: Overlap candidate with Tony Alpha's own Morning Briefing. Decide: does Morning Digest feed Tony's briefing, or does Tony replace it? For now they coexist.

agents.name: Buffer Connection Check
agents.purpose: Verify the Buffer integration/connection is live so social publishing doesn't silently fail.
agents.notes: Infrastructure guard for the social publishing pipeline.

agents.name: Weekly Status Draft
agents.purpose: Draft the weekly status update.
agents.notes: Part of the weekly cluster (see flags). Confirm distinct from Sunday planning/recap.

agents.name: Log Hours Reminder
agents.purpose: Remind to log billable/work hours.
agents.notes: Owner may be Finance if tied to invoicing/billable hours — confirm.

agents.name: Weekly Social Plans
agents.purpose: Plan the week's social content/schedule.
agents.notes: Social cluster — planning half. Feeds Content Batch.

agents.name: Weekly Command Center Reminder
agents.purpose: Weekly reminder to review the command center (now Tony Alpha).
agents.notes: This reminder now points at Tony Alpha. Good candidate to become the trigger for Tony's Weekly Review.

agents.name: Sunday Weekly Planning
agents.purpose: Plan the upcoming week each Sunday.
agents.notes: Weekly cluster.

agents.name: Sunday Evening Recap
agents.purpose: Recap the past week on Sunday evening.
agents.notes: Weekly cluster — recap half.

agents.name: Content Batch for Socials
agents.purpose: Batch-create social content for publishing.
agents.notes: Social cluster — creation half.

agents.name: Malwarebytes Scan
agents.purpose: Run/verify an antivirus (Malwarebytes) scan on the machine.
agents.notes: Security hygiene.

agents.name: Performance Review on Agents
agents.purpose: Review the quality/output of the agents (not just uptime).
agents.notes: See Agent Health Check overlap note. Tony Alpha's fleet-flagging is a superset of this — coordinate rather than duplicate.

agents.name: GHL Lead Text Batch Reminder
agents.purpose: Remind to send the batch of lead texts through GoHighLevel.
agents.notes: See GHL SMS Monitor overlap note (inbound vs outbound).
